title: VSave Method, Spel Class
description: Saves vision properties in the current EPSON RC+ project.
notes: Use VSave to make any changes to vision properties permanent.
see_also:
VSet

VSave Example

VB Example:

With m_spel

  .VSet("seq01", "blob01", "SearchWinLeft", 100)

  .VSet("seq01", "corr01", "Accept", userAccept)

  .VSave()
End With

C# Example:

m_spel.VSet("seq01", "blob01", "SearchWinLeft", 100);

m_spel.VSet("seq01", "corr01", "Accept", userAccept);

m_spel.VSave();
